headlines.title: Trump: Iran is ‘negotiating on fumes’ as deal remains unclear
headlines.description: President Donald Trump said he only plans to make a good deal with Iran, or not make a deal at all, as Iranian state media released a draft of what they said was an alleged peace deal outline. NBC News’ Monica Alba reports that the White House called the released memorandum a “fabrication.”

headlines.title: Deal or no deal? Trump’s social media posts add confusion to Iran conflict
headlines.description: President Donald Trump’s social posts left a trail of confusion over the weekend as Iran negotiations continue.

headlines.title: Matthew Perry’s former assistant sentenced to three years in drug overdose death
headlines.description: \Matthew Perry’s former personal assistant was sentenced Wednesday to three years and five months in federal prison for giving the “Friends” star the ketamine injections that left the actor dead of an overdose in a hot tub back in 2023.

headlines.title: U.S. plans to send Americans exposed to Ebola to facility in Kenya
headlines.description: The Trump administration is preparing a quarantine facility in Kenya for Americans who have been exposed to Ebola amid the escalating outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo, an administration official said Wednesday

headlines.title: Red hot AI demand pushes more companies into the $1 trillion club
headlines.description: Micron Technologies and SK Hynix joined the trillion-dollar club, which includes Apple, Meta and Tesla.

headlines.title: Gavin Newsom takes a populist turn on AI ahead of a possible 2028 presidential run
headlines.description: AI is becoming a dominant political issue, with many on the right and the left coalescing around concerns about the rapid growth of the industry.

headlines.title: Vance calls Pope Leo’s AI warnings ‘profound’
headlines.description: Vance said in an interview with NBC News he is glad the pope tackled AI. He also discussed why X remains off his phone after he deleted it for Lent.

headlines.title: New blood test is added an an option for colorectal cancer screenings
headlines.description: As cases continue to rise, a blood test has been added to the list of the American Cancer Society’s recommended screenings for colorectal cancer. It’s not meant to replace colonoscopies, but could help catch cancers when people might not get screened otherwise. NBC News' Erika Edwards reports on how effective the blood test is.

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: Trump racks up May primary wins in Republican retribution campaign
headlines.description: President Donald Trump went on a winning streak in May primaries as he ousted several Republicans who had dissented from his party line, further tightening his grip on the GOP.

headlines.title: James Talarico says he ‘missed the mark’ on ‘cringey’ comments as Texas general election starts
headlines.description: Texas state Rep. James Talarico said Wednesday that previous comments he’s made on sensitive cultural issues “missed the mark,” as Republicans lean on those remarks to attack him in the contentious Senate race.

headlines.title: U.S. plans to send Americans exposed to Ebola to facility in Kenya
headlines.description: The Trump administration is preparing a quarantine facility in Kenya for Americans who have been exposed to Ebola amid the escalating outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo, an administration official said Wednesday
